add_namespace = md_test

country_event = {
	id = md_test.1
	title = md_test.1.t
	desc = md_test.1.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_md_generic

	is_triggered_only = yes

	trigger = {
		tag = USA
		has_government = democratic
	}

	option = {
		name = md_test.1.o1
		add_political_power = 100
		add_stability = 0.05
	}
}
